name: velverse-ai-taskflow
description: Velverse AI + TaskFlow — World-Class Unified Platform (5 AI Squads + Kanban Task Management + Razorpay + JWT + MongoDB)

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start:prod: cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm run build && cross-env NODE_ENV=production npm start
